Title: Send default notification template
Preconditions: Admin logged in; notification module installed
Steps:
1. Navigate to Notifications
2. Select a notification type
3. Open default template
4. Click Send to test email
Expected Result: Notification email sent successfully using default template

Title: Send template for concrete localization
Steps:
1. Navigate to Notifications
2. Select notification with multiple language templates
3. Choose a specific localization
4. Send to test email
Expected Result: Email sent using the selected language template

Title: Disable notification
Steps:
1. Navigate to Notifications
2. Select a notification type
3. Toggle Active = OFF
4. Trigger the notification event
Expected Result: Notification is not sent when disabled

Title: Add default recipient for notification
Steps:
1. Navigate to Notifications
2. Select a notification type
3. Add default recipient email
4. Save
Expected Result: Default recipient saved and receives notifications

Title: Notification added to feed
Steps:
1. Trigger a notification event (e.g. new order)
2. Navigate to Notification feed
Expected Result: Notification appears in the feed with correct details

Title: Unregistered notifications handling
Steps:
1. Navigate to Notifications
2. Check for unregistered notification types
Expected Result: Unregistered notifications are displayed with appropriate warning

Title: Create template with sample data preview
Steps:
1. Navigate to Notifications
2. Select a notification type
3. Click Preview
4. Enter sample data
5. Click Preview button
Expected Result: Template rendered correctly with sample data

Title: Edit sample data in preview
Preconditions: Preview is open with sample data
Steps:
1. Edit sample data JSON fields
2. Click Preview
Expected Result: Preview updates to reflect edited sample data

Title: Share preview - send email with preview
Steps:
1. Click Share in preview
2. Enter valid email address
3. Click Send
Expected Result: Preview email sent to specified address

Title: Share preview - invalid email validation
Steps:
1. Click Share
2. Enter invalid email format
3. Attempt to send
Expected Result: Validation error shown; email not sent

Title: Registration notification template
Steps:
1. Register a new user on storefront
2. Check email inbox
Expected Result: Registration confirmation email received with correct template

Title: Registration invitation notification
Steps:
1. Send registration invitation from Admin
2. Check recipient email inbox
Expected Result: Invitation email received with registration link

Title: Password reset notification
Steps:
1. Request password reset on storefront
2. Check email inbox
Expected Result: Password reset email received with valid reset link

Title: Password reset limit enforcement
Steps:
1. Request password reset multiple times exceeding limit
2. Attempt another reset
Expected Result: Reset request blocked; limit exceeded message shown

Title: Email confirmation notification
Steps:
1. Register new user or change email
2. Check inbox for confirmation email
Expected Result: Email confirmation notification received with verification link

Title: Two-factor authentication email
Steps:
1. Login with 2FA-enabled account
2. Check email for verification code
Expected Result: 2FA code email received with valid code

Title: Organization registration notification
Steps:
1. Register a new organization on storefront
2. Check admin/email notifications
Expected Result: Organization registration email notification sent

Title: Enable abandoned cart notifications (global)
Steps:
1. Navigate to Settings > Notifications
2. Enable abandoned cart notifications globally
3. Save
Expected Result: Global abandoned cart notification setting enabled

Title: Trigger abandoned cart email after default time
Preconditions: Abandoned cart notifications enabled; cart exists
Steps:
1. Create a cart with items
2. Wait for default reminder time (5 days or configured)
3. Check email
Expected Result: Abandoned cart reminder email sent after configured time

Title: Custom reminder time for abandoned cart
Steps:
1. Navigate to abandoned cart settings
2. Set custom reminder time
3. Save and trigger
Expected Result: Abandoned cart email sent at custom time interval

Title: Create order notification
Steps:
1. Create a new order
2. Check email for order confirmation
Expected Result: Order creation notification email received

Title: Cancel order notification
Steps:
1. Cancel an existing order
2. Check email for cancellation notification
Expected Result: Order cancellation notification email sent

Title: Order paid notification
Steps:
1. Mark order payment as Paid
2. Check email
Expected Result: Order paid notification email received

Title: Order sent notification
Steps:
1. Change shipment status to Sent
2. Check email
Expected Result: Order shipped notification email received

Title: Invoice notification for customer
Steps:
1. Generate invoice for an order
2. Check customer email
Expected Result: Invoice email received with order details

Title: Shipment status change notification - PickPack
Steps:
1. Change shipment document status to PickPack
2. Check notification
Expected Result: Notification sent for PickPack status change

Title: Shipment status change notification - Sent
Steps:
1. Change shipment document status to Sent
2. Check notification
Expected Result: Notification sent for Sent status change

Title: Payment status change notification - Paid
Steps:
1. Change payment document status to Paid
2. Check notification
Expected Result: Notification sent for Paid status change

Title: Payment status change notification - Refunded
Steps:
1. Change payment document status to Refunded
2. Check notification
Expected Result: Notification sent for Refunded status change

Title: SMS notification - phone number change
Steps:
1. Configure SMS notification gateway
2. Trigger phone number change event
3. Check SMS delivery
Expected Result: SMS notification sent for phone number change

Title: SMS notification - two-factor authentication
Steps:
1. Configure SMS as 2FA method
2. Login with 2FA-enabled account
3. Check SMS
Expected Result: 2FA code received via SMS

Title: Search notifications list
Steps:
1. Navigate to Notifications list
2. Enter search term in search field
Expected Result: Notifications filtered by search term

Title: Search by notification type
Steps:
1. Navigate to Notifications list
2. Search by notification type name
Expected Result: List filtered to show matching notification types

Title: Add new notification template
Steps:
1. Navigate to Notifications
2. Select notification type
3. Click Add Template
4. Select language
5. Enter template content
6. Save
Expected Result: New template created and saved for selected language

Title: Add default template
Steps:
1. Select notification type
2. Click Add Template
3. Select Default language
4. Enter content and Save
Expected Result: Default template created successfully

Title: Overwrite template with same localization
Steps:
1. Add new template for same localization
2. Confirm overwrite
Expected Result: Existing template overwritten with new content

Title: Save changes for email template
Steps:
1. Edit email template content
2. Click Save
Expected Result: Changes saved successfully for email template

Title: Save changes for SMS template
Steps:
1. Edit SMS template content
2. Click Save
Expected Result: Changes saved successfully for SMS template

Title: Undo template changes
Steps:
1. Make changes to template
2. Click Undo/Reset
Expected Result: Template reverted to last saved state

Title: Add notification layout
Steps:
1. Navigate to Notification layouts
2. Click Add
3. Enter layout name and template
4. Save
Expected Result: New notification layout created and saved

Title: Edit notification layout
Steps:
1. Open existing layout
2. Edit template content
3. Save
Expected Result: Layout updated successfully

Title: Delete notification layout
Steps:
1. Select layout
2. Click Delete
3. Confirm
Expected Result: Layout deleted successfully

Title: Reset notification layout
Steps:
1. Open modified layout
2. Click Reset
Expected Result: Layout restored to default state

Title: Add notification template with layout
Steps:
1. Open notification template
2. Assign layout
3. Preview and save
Expected Result: Template rendered with layout wrapper

Title: Check layout in sent mail
Steps:
1. Send notification with layout-assigned template
2. Check email
Expected Result: Email contains layout wrapper around notification content

Title: Predefined notification - edit and restore
Steps:
1. Open predefined notification
2. Edit template content
3. Save
4. Click Restore
Expected Result: Predefined template editable; restore returns to original

Title: Send edited predefined template
Steps:
1. Edit predefined template
2. Send to test email
Expected Result: Edited predefined template content sent in email

Title: Access permission - notifications
Steps:
1. Login as user with notification:access
2. Navigate to Notifications
Expected Result: Notifications module accessible

Title: Template create permission
Steps:
1. Login as user with template:create
2. Add a new template
Expected Result: Template creation allowed for authorized user

Title: Settings - manage notification languages
Steps:
1. Navigate to Settings > Notifications > Languages
2. Add a new language
3. Save
Expected Result: New language added to notification language list

Title: Settings - delete notification language
Steps:
1. Navigate to Settings > Notifications > Languages
2. Select language and delete
Expected Result: Language removed from notification languages

Title: NotificationsSample module - install and test
Steps:
1. Install NotificationsSample module
2. Create a new template
3. Send notification
4. Update template and resend
5. Delete template
Expected Result: Module installs correctly; CRUD operations on sample notifications work
